originalTitle: Tech stocks just had one of their worst weeks in a year. Here’s how AI momentum went off the rails.
summary: It one of the worst weeks for tech stocks of the year, and Wall Street spent much of it confronting a question it had been too euphoric to ask: what exactly are we getting for all this AI spending?
content:
The stock market is still unable to make new records without the ‘Magnificent Seven’ cohort

Markets haven’t had many weeks in 2026 like this one.

The Nasdaq Composite and the S&P 500 bled steadily throughout the week, with memory-chip stocks and the “ Magnificent Seven ” getting hit as investors grew increasingly skeptical about the massive bets technology companies are making on artificial intelligence.
chineseTitle: 科技股刚刚经历了一年中最糟糕的一周。以下是 AI 发展势头如何脱轨的原因。
chineseSummary: 这是今年科技股最糟糕的一周之一，华尔街大部分时间都在面对一个它过于乐观而无法提出的问题：我们从所有这些人工智能支出中到底得到了什么？
chineseContent:
没有“七雄”，股市仍无法创造新纪录

2026 年市场还没有经历过像这样的几周。

纳斯达克综合指数和标准普尔 500 指数本周稳步下跌，随着投资者对科技公司在人工智能上的大规模押注越来越怀疑，存储芯片股和“七巨头”股票受到打击。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
